items.title: RSPack 2.0: Performance Gains, Leaner Dependencies and ESM Core
items.summaryShort: RSPack 2.0: Performance Gains, Leaner Dependencies and ESM Core. Rspack, developed by ByteDance, has released version 2.0, featuring enhanced performance, reduced dependencies, and a focus on modern ECMAScript modules.

items.title: GitLab Brings Carbon Awareness to CI/CD to Measure the Environmental Cost of Software Delivery

items.title: Presentation: Engineering AI for Creativity and Curiosity on Mobile
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Engineering AI for Creativity and Curiosity on Mobile. Bhavuk Jain discusses translating foundational AI into scalable mobile products.

items.title: Yelp Unifies ML Model Training with Training Orchestrator
items.summaryShort: Yelp Unifies ML Model Training with Training Orchestrator. Yelp has launched Training Orchestrator.

items.title: Dimension Capital's $800M third fund shows the intersection of science and compute is booming
items.summaryShort: Dimension Capital's $800M third fund shows the intersection of science and compute is booming. The four-year-old firm's latest fund is 60% larger than its second vehicle announced 18 months ago.

items.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
items.summaryShort: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination. At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.
